topics: Failure Analysis - Failure Density - Failure Rate - Probability of Failure - Bathtub Curve. Basic Reliability Equations, Reliability in Terms of Failure Rate and Failure Density, Relation Between Reliability, Failure Density and Hazard Rate - Mean Time to Failure (MTTF) - Integral Equation of MTTF in Terms of Reliability
Linearly Increasing Hazard Model - Weibull Model. Expressions for Reliability, Failure Density, and Probability of Failure of These Models
Reliability Block Diagrams (RBD), Components Connected in Series
Fault Tree Analysis (FTA), Symbols Used in FTA, Fault Tree Construction - Estimation of System Reliability from Fault Tree Problems
Reliability Improvement Methods - Redundancy - Unit Redundancies - Element Redundancies. Simplification of Design - Parts Derating - Operating Environment

Cost of Reliability - Factors to be Considered for Optimizing the Reliability Cost. Reliability Allocation - Basic Concepts. Reliability Allocation for a Series System - Proportional to Uniform Failure Rate Method of Reliability Allocation
